name: Cas12a crRNA Designer
description: Scans a DNA target sequence for all TTTV PAM sites (TTTA, TTTC, or TTTG), takes the 23 nt immediately downstream of each as the protospacer, prepends the LbCas12a direct repeat, and returns up to 10 candidates in order of appearance. No scoring or ranking.

inputs.name: seq
inputs.description: DNA target sequence to scan for the first TTTV PAM site. Accepts a resource name (e.g. 'ecoli_rpsl'), a raw sequence string, FASTA content, or GenBank content. The framework resolves the format automatically.

outputs.description: A list of up to 10 candidates in order of position. Each has crrna_sequence (full RNA crRNA: LbCas12a direct repeat + spacer, T→U), protospacer (23 bp DNA), and pam_site (4 bp TTTV).
